<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a GNOME MPD client written in Python using GTK4 and python-mpd2. The application connects to a Music Player Daemon server and provides a graphical interface to control music playback.

Key components:
- MPD connection handling with python-mpd2
- GTK4 user interface using PyGObject
- GNOME desktop integration
